description_long: This apple is medium-sized, round, and slightly asymmetrical, with a deep red to purplish skin speckled with numerous small, pale yellow lenticels. The surface appears smooth with a subtle matte sheen, and the skin shows natural color variation, including some lighter and darker patches. The top of the apple features a small, recessed stem cavity with a short, brown stem visible. The bottom is gently rounded, lacking any pronounced protrusions or indentations. There is a minor surface blemish visible on one side, but the overall skin is intact and unbroken. The apple's coloration and texture suggest it is fresh and ripe, suitable for eating or display in an urban environment.
description: A round, deep red apple with pale speckles and a smooth, matte skin. It has a short brown stem and a minor surface blemish.
description_view_0: Shows the apple's rounded side with a visible stem and prominent speckling.
description_view_1: Displays a slightly flatter side with dense speckling and a less visible stem.
description_view_2: Highlights a darker, more uniform red area with fewer visible blemishes.
description_view_3: Reveals a minor surface blemish and a clear view of the stem cavity.
attribute_visible_damage_or_blemishes: minor surface blemish on one side
